张芝.飞白: Transform Skill, Compulsory Skill. Yang: when a non-black card of yours deals damage, that damage is increased by 1. Yin: when a non-red card of yours restores HP, that recovery is increased by 1.

谋庞统.飞军: Once per Play phase, you may discard a card, then choose one: 1. a character with more hand cards than you gives you a card; 2. a character with more cards in their equipment zone than you discards one card from their equipment zone.
谋庞统.潜袭: During your Preparation phase, you may draw a card and discard a card, then a character at distance 1 cannot use or play hand cards of the same color as your discarded card this turn.
